stem: A program should take a student's score out of 100 and print "Pass" if the score is at least 40, otherwise print "Fail".
model_answer:
OCR pseudocode:
  score = input("Enter score: ")
  if score >= 40 then
    print("Pass")
  else
    print("Fail")
  endif

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Write the program in OCR pseudocode or a high-level language.

accepted_alternatives: uses input() to get the score

mark_points.text: uses if/else with the condition score >= 40 (or equivalent)
prints "Pass" when condition true and "Fail" otherwise
accepted_alternatives: outputs Pass or Fail based on score
